entry.title: BEE IT SUN SPF50 Maya 50ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: BEE IT
Type: Tanning Oil & Lotion
Price: 9.90

High protection sun milk, effective and protecting the skin from both UVA and UVB rays. Suitable for sensitive skin and also suitable for kids under 3 years old. Protects skin against aging, sun spots and keeps skin hydrated.

Also effective in protecting the bees!

How to use: Apply to face/body before sun exposure until absorbed. Repeat the application frequently for a safe, even and long-lasting tan.

Ingredients: Aqua [Water], Ethylhexyl methoxycinnamate, Octocrylene, Butyl methoxydibenzoylmethane, Methylene bis-benzotriazolyl tetramethylbutylphenol, Helianthus annuus (Sunflower) seed oil, Glyceryl stearate SE, Prunus amygdalus dulcis (Sweet almond) oil, Glycerin, Phenoxyethanol, Decyl glucoside, Tocopheryl acetate, Citric acid, Parfum [Fragrance], Ethylhexylglycerin, Aloe barbadensis leaf juice*, Tetrasodium glutamate diacetate, Olea europaea (Olive) fruit oil*, Oryza sativa (Rice) bran oil, Vitis vinifera (Grape) seed oil, Allantoin, Propylene glycol, Xanthan gum, Vaccinium myrtillus (Myrtle) fruit extract, Avena sativa (Oat) kernel extract*, Calendula officinalis flower extract*, Sodium hydroxide, Mel/Honey*, Propolis wax, Sodium benzoate, Potassium sorbate.

*Organic

Animal Friendly | No Paraffin | No Silicones | No Parabens | 100% Recyclable

“Less plastic is fantastic” packaging is using 70% less plastic compared to a normal bottle pack. Less bulk, being soft and doesn’t break, generates a better recycling chain and allows use of all its contents.

By purchasing BEE IT cosmetics  you contribute to the creation of new bee oasis. 

Made in Italy

entry.title: NAIF Mineral Sunscreen Spray SPF50 100ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: NAIF
Type: Suncreen
Price: 24.90

Naif Mineral Sunscreen Spray SPF50 is developed for the sensitive skin with a reef-friendly formula and is suitable for the whole family. The zinc oxide based UV filter protects the skin immediately against UVA and UVB with minimum risk of skin irritation. The convenient spray makes for a quick and easy application.

  • High protection of sensitive skin with mineral UV filter
  • Protects immediately against UVA and UVB radiation
  • Water-resistant: Enjoy the water safely
  • Reef-friendly: no oxybenzone, octinoxate, and octocrylene
  • In convenient spray, so easy and quick to apply to the skin

How to use: Shake the spray before use. Apply a generous amount to the body and face before you go in the sun. Reapply every two hours and after swimming for optimum protection. Do not keep product in the sun.

Ingredients: Decyl Oleate, Zinc Oxide, Coco-Caprylate/Caprate, Alcohol, Triheptanoin, Parfum/Fragrance, Polyhydroxystearic Acid, Allantoin, Tocopherol, Aqua/Water, Silica Dimethyl Silylate, Pongamol, Helianthus Annuus Seed Oil, Bisabolol, Denatonium Benzoate

Bottle made from bioplastic

entry.title: NAIF Cooling Aftersun 100ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: NAIF
Type: Suncreen
Price: 13.90

Naïf Cooling After Sun Gel soothes, moisturizes and restores the skin after a sunny day. Aloe Vera provides cooling and regeneration, glycerine for hydration. This keeps even the most sensitive skin soft and supple. Just what the skin needs after exposure to UV rays. Also nice: absorbs quickly and doesn't leave a sticky layer.

How to use: Apply generously after exposure to the sun. Especially on the areas that have had a lot of sun. Repeat if skin still feels dry.

Tip: Keep the gel in the refrigerator, so it is extra cooling.

Ingredients: Aqua/Water, Glycerin, Methylpropanediol, Cetearyl Alcohol, Cetyl Alcohol, Glyceryl Stearate Citrate, Parfum/Fragrance, Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Juice Powder, Allantoin, Caprylyl Glycol, Phenylpropanol, Xanthan Gum, Lactic Acid, Sodium Hydroxide

All Naïf products are vegan, made with a mild fragrance and dermatologically tested, without the 26 most common allergens. They also do not contain SLES or microplastics. The tubes are made from sugar cane-based bioplastic.

entry.title: UpCircle Beauty SPF 25 Mineral Sunscreen 60ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: UpCircle Beauty
Type: Suncreen
Price: 32.90

This reef-safe, dermatologically approved mineral sunscreen provides an essential physical defence against premature ageing caused by the sun. Naturally derived non-nano zinc oxide protects the skin whilst powerful antioxidant raspberry seed oil defends against free radical damage.

Formulated using only the highest quality zinc oxide that seamlessly blends in to leave nothing but a natural glow. With more than 20 iterations of this vegan sunscreen over three years, it's safe to say UpCircle Beauty got it perfect! No wonder it's already won multiple awards!

Once applied, the lightweight formula absorbs within 15 minutes to create a natural finish with a subtle glow. Skin-soothing aloe vera calms inflammation and quenches the moisture barrier, whilst humectant glycerin seals in hydration. The plastic-free sunscreen is formulated with non-comedogenic sunflower oil as well as breakout-busting lavender oil, making it a great sunscreen for those with acne-prone skin.

How to use: Apply liberally to face after moisturising, massaging into face until absorbed. Apply before sun exposure. Re-apply frequently to maintain protection, especially after swimming, perspiring or towelling.

Ingredients: Aqua, Zinc Oxide, Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride, Coco Caprylate/Caprate, Glycerin, Coco Glucoside, Cetearyl Alcohol, Isoamyl Laurate, Coconut Alcohol, Rubus Idaeus (Raspberry) Seed Oil, Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Extract, Tocopherol, Helianthus Annuus Seed Oil, Lavandula Angustifolia (Lavender) Flower Oil, Cellulose Gum, Lecithin, Xanthan Gum, Glucose, Cetearyl Glucoside, Glyceryl Caprylate, Isostearic Acid, Polyhydroxystearic Acid, Polyglyceryl-3 Polyricinoleate, Dehydroacetic Acid, Benzyl Alcohol, Geraniol^, Limonene^, Linalool^.

^Natural constituent of essential oils listed.

99% NATURAL INGREDIENTS

Handmade | Social Good | Recycled Materials | Zero Waste | Cruelty Free | Vegan | Natural Resources | Non Toxic

entry.title: LUUV Shimmering Carrot Dry Oil Bronze 100ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: LUUV
Type: Lotion
Price: 20.00

Bronze, shimmering skin is just within reach! LUUV Shimmering Carrot Dry Oil is an aloe-based, richly moisturizing vitamin bomb that gives the skin an eye-catching, beautiful gleam. The carrot oil, rich in vitamin A and beta-carotene, makes the skin beautifully radiant without a self-tanning effect.

The antioxidants and vitamin E in carrot oil help maintain the skin’s youthful appearance, while aloe soothes and deeply moisturizes the skin, helping to maintain its moisture level. The skin remains silky soft, elastic, vibrant, and radiant. The dry oil contains light-reflecting mica particles that gently shimmer and are safe for both the skin and the environment. It is ideal for all skin types, does not clog pores, and is suitable for daily use. The gel-like texture of the dry oil glides effortlessly over the skin, absorbs quickly, and does not leave the skin sticky or greasy.

  • Deeply moisturizes
  • Improves skin elasticity
  • Enhances complexion
  • Gel-like texture
  • Absorbs quickly
  • Washable sparkle
  • Suitable for all skin types
  • Natural SPF 10

Key ingredients: 

  • Carrot oil (specifically carrot seed oil) contains a lot of carotene, which gives a complexion-enhancing effect. Carrot oil is always in a carrier oil (i.e., diluted) because it is too intense on its own. It contains a lot of vitamin A. The natural SPF of carrot oil is around 40, but since it is diluted, it ends up around SPF 10.
  • Aloe has been used in folk medicine for centuries. Aloe is an excellent moisturizer and soothes irritations, making it great for sunburn relief. Aloe has a calming effect and carries oxygen to the skin, leaving it silky and soft.
  • Orange essential oil is primarily used to scent the product with a fresh, sweet citrus aroma. Essential oils can penetrate the skin and provide an immediate mood-lifting, energizing feeling. Citrus oils are suitable for brightening the skin.
  • We use caramel for coloring (in self-tanning mousse and bronze dry oil). It is a 100% natural colorant with a pleasant caramel aroma, making it an eco-friendly choice.

natural | cruelty free | sustainable | paraben free | vegan

The product is made in Estonia

How to use: Shake the bottle before use. Apply an appropriate amount of the product to clean skin.

Ingredients: Aqua, Dunaliella Salina Extract, Helianthus Annuus Seed Oil, Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Juice, Citrus Nobilis (Mandarin) Peel Oil, Citrus Aurantium (Orange) Peel Oil, Xanthan Gum, Triethyl Citrate, Glyceryl Caprylate, Benzoic Acid, Mica, Titanium Dioxide (CI 77891), Raphanus Sativus (Radish) Root Extract, Citric Acid, Maltodextrin, Parfum, Citral, Limonene, Linalool

entry.title: LUUV Natural Carrot Dry Oil with Aloe Vera 100ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: LUUV
Type: Foot Cream
Price: 19.00

Natural radiant complexion without sunbathing or self-tanners? Yes, with LUUV Carrot Dry Oil, it’s possible! This dry oil is a natural vitamin bomb that deeply moisturizes your skin and restores its radiance and elasticity. The vitamin A and beta-carotene in carrot oil give your skin a beautiful healthy glow without tanning it. The dry oil is also rich in antioxidants and vitamin E, which help maintain youthful skin. Aloe has a soothing effect and provides long-lasting hydration.

The dry oil has a gel-like texture that is easily spreadable, absorbs quickly, and doesn’t leave the skin greasy or sticky. Its pleasant citrusy scent is refreshing and relaxing. LUUV Carrot Dry Oil is designed for all skin types, it doesn’t clog pores, and is great for everyday skincare. LUUV Carrot Dry Oil with aloe is natural, vegan, and contains only good ingredients.

  • Deeply hydrating 
  • Improves skin elasticity
  • Improves complexion
  • Absorbs quickly 
  • Non-greasy finish
  • For all skin types
  • Natural SPF10

Key ingredients: 

  • Carrot oil (specifically carrot seed oil) contains a lot of carotene, which gives a complexion-enhancing effect. Carrot oil is always in a carrier oil (i.e., diluted) because it is too intense on its own. It contains a lot of vitamin A. The natural SPF of carrot oil is around 40, but since it is diluted, it ends up around SPF 10.
  • Aloe has been used in folk medicine for centuries. Aloe is an excellent moisturizer and soothes irritations, making it great for sunburn relief. Aloe has a calming effect and carries oxygen to the skin, leaving it silky and soft.
  • Orange essential oil is primarily used to scent the product with a fresh, sweet citrus aroma. Essential oils can penetrate the skin and provide an immediate mood-lifting, energizing feeling. Citrus oils are suitable for brightening the skin.

natural | cruelty free | sustainable | paraben free | vegan

The product is made in Estonia

How to use: Apply a suitable amount of the product to clean skin. Suitable for daily use on all skin types.

Ingredients: Aqua, Dunaliella Salina Extract, Helianthus Annuus Seed Oil, Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Juice, Citrus Reticulata (Mandarin Oil), Citrus Sinensis (Orange Oil), Xanthan Gum, Triethyl Citrate, Sodium benzoate, Potassium sorbate, Glyceryl Caprylate, Citric Acid, Benzoic Acid, Parfum, Citral, Limonene, Linalool

entry.title: NAIF Mineral Sunscreen SPF30 100ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: NAIF
Type: Suncreen
Price: 22.90

Mineral Sunscreen SPF30 is sunscreen suitable for the whole family. The zinc oxide based UV filter protects the skin immediately with minimum risk of skin irritation.

The zinc oxide based UV filter adds a protective layer on top of the skin which reflects the sunbeams. This results in immediate effectiveness against UVA and UVB radiation. The added natural oils make application easy.

  • Protects immediately against UVA and UVB radiation for all skin types
  • Water-resistant formula
  • Dermatologically tested

How to use: Shake before use! Apply a generous amount of sunscreen evenly to the body and face before you go out in the sun. This sunscreen offers immediate protection! Reapply every two hours and after swimming for optimal protection.

Be aware that zinc oxide, the sun and water can have a dehydrating effect on the skin. Make sure to rehydrate the skin with an after sun or a nourishing cream after a day in the sun.

 Do not keep product in the sun.

Ingredients: Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride, Decyl Oleate, Zinc Oxide, Hydrogenated Vegetable Oil, Caprylic/Capric/Myristic/Stearic Triglyceride, Dextrin Palmitate, Coco-Caprylate/Caprate, Triheptanoin, Ricinus Communis Seed Oil, Bis-Ethylhexyloxyphenol Methoxyphenyl Triazine, Cocos Nucifera Oil, Polyhydroxystearic Acid, Parfum/Fragrance, Allantoin, Tocopherol, Palmitic Acid, Helianthus Annuus Seed Oil, Oryzanol, Bisabolol, Pongamo

Tube made from recycled plastic

entry.title: NAIF Mineral Sunscreen Stick 0% Perfume for Baby & Kids SPF50 36g
entry.summary:
Vendor: NAIF
Type: Suncreen
Price: 14.90

Mineral Sunscreen Stick SPF50 is a sunscreen for Baby & Kids. The zinc oxide based UV filter protects the skin immediately with minimum risk of skin irritation. Easy to take and to apply, even by kids who want to do everything themselves. Without added perfume and suitable for sensitive skin.

The sunscreen contains zinc-oxide: a natural ingredient that adds a protective layer on top of the skin which reflects sunbeams. This results in immediate effectiveness against UVA and UVB radiation.

  • Protects immediately against UVA and UVB radiation for baby- and kids skin
  • Water-resistant formula
  • Dermatologically tested, 0% perfume for extra sensitive skin

How to use: Apply a generous amount to the body and face before your kids go in the sun. Make sure to spread it well. Reapply every two hours and after swimming for maximum protection

Ingredients: Caprylic/Capric/Myristic/Stearic Triglyceride, Zinc Oxide, Helianthus Annuus Seed Cera, Hydrogenated Rapeseed Oil, Tocopherol, Pongamol, Helianthus Annuus Seed Oil, Ascorbyl Palmitate

Tube made from recycled plastic

entry.title: NAIF Mineral Sunscreen 0% Perfume for Baby & Kids SPF50 100ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: NAIF
Type: Suncreen
Price: 22.90

Mineral Sunscreen SPF50 is sunscreen for Baby & Kids. The zinc oxide based UV filter protects the skin immediately with minimum risk of skin irritation. 

The sunscreen contains zinc-oxide: a natural ingredient that adds a protective layer on top of the skin which reflects sunbeams. The sunscreen also does not contain added perfume, which makes it suitable for even the most sensitive skin. This results in immediate effectiveness against UVA and UVB radiation. The added natural oils make application easy and hydrates the skin.

  • Protects immediately against UVA and UVB radiation for baby- and kids skin
  • Water-resistant formula
  • Dermatologically tested, 0% perfume for extra sensitive skin

How to use: Shake the sunscreen before use. Apply a generous amount evenly to the body and face before your kids go in the sun. Reapply every two hours and after swimming for optimum protection. Do not keep product in the sun.

Ingredients: Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride, Decyl Oleate, Zinc Oxide, Hydrogenated Vegetable Oil, Caprylic/Capric/Myristic/Stearic Triglyceride, Dextrin Palmitate, Coco-Caprylate/Caprate, Triheptanoin, Ricinus Communis Seed Oil, Bis-Ethylhexyloxyphenol Methoxyphenyl Triazine, Cocos Nucifera Oil, Polyhydroxystearic Acid, Allantoin, Tocopherol, Palmitic Acid, Helianthus Annuus Seed Oil, Oryzanol, Bisabolol, Pongamol

Tube made from recycled plastic

entry.title: Blokzeep Sun Block - Mineral sunscreen SPF30 40g
entry.summary:
Vendor: Blokzeep
Type: Suncreen
Price: 19.99

Protecting your skin is very important. That is why Blokzeep has developed a mineral sunscreen that not only protects you, but also the coral reef. As an effective SPF filter, the Sun Block therefore contains the mineral Zinc Oxide. This is a 100% natural UV filter that does not remain in nature or in your body. Zinc oxide protects against both UVA and UVB, which means that it prevents both burning and aging of the skin. You can use this sunscreen on both your body and face, so everything you need is in one bar. Furthermore, the bar contains natural & refreshing Mint oil. Mint, just like Aloe Vera, has cooling properties and your skin will thank you after sunbathing.

Blokzeep offers plastic-free & mineral sunscreen without the hassle. Natural ingredients, safe for nature and without drying alcohol! Packaging is 100% plastic-free.

Sun Block mineral sunscreen is also super economical to use and therefore lasts a very long time!

How to use: Warm the bar between your hands or briefly hold the side against your skin to warm up. Rub the bar over your skin and spread (the sunscreen) with your hands. Don't forget to apply sunscreen every 2-3 hours when you are in full sun. 

Ingredients: Cetearyl Alcohol, Myristyl Myristate, Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride, Euphorbia Cerifera Cera, Zinc Oxide, Olea Europaea Fruit Oil, Lavandula Angustifolia Extract, Mentha Arvensis Oil, Tocopheryl Acetate, Limonene

entry.title: HEJ Organic The Protector SPF30 Face Cream 30ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: Hej
Type: Day Cream
Price: 14.90

Protects your skin every day and in all weathers with SPF30 and thus counteract premature skin aging. Mineral UV filter protects you from UVA and UVB rays without any whitening. The Protector Face Cream's quickly absorbed texture is light and moisturizing.

  • Light day care with SPF30 for all skin types
  • Mineral UV filter absorbs quickly without whitening
  • Vitamin C and hyaluronic acid protect the skin and moisturize
  • Now even more sustainable: Aluminum tube (100% recyclable) for complete emptying of the product
  • 100% vegan and natural

How to use: Apply me to your face, neck and décolleté in the morning, as well as every now and then if you spend a long time outdoors.

Ingredients: Aqua, Opuntia Ficus-Indica Flower Extract*, Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride, Titanium Dioxide, Glycine Soja Oil*, Glyceryl Citrate/Lactate/Linoleate/Oleate, Butyrospermum Parkii Butter*, Zinc Oxide, Prunus Amygdalus Dulcis Oil*, Pongamia Glabra Seed Oil*, Glycerin, Opuntia Ficus-Indica Seed Oil*, Sodium Hyaluronate, Simmondsia Chinensis Seed Oil*, Citrus Paradisi Fruit Extract*, Tocopherol, Polyglyceryl-2 Dipolyhydroxystearate, Polyglyceryl-3 Diisostearate, Sodium PCA, Sorbitol, Ascorbyl Palmitate, Hydrogenated Coco-Glycerides, Acacia Senegal Gum, Alumina, Lauroyl Lysine, Xanthan Gum, Levulinic Acid, Cetearyl Alcohol, p-Anisic Acid, Glyceryl Caprylate, Stearic Acid, Glyceryl Stearate Citrate, Glyceryl Stearate, Parfum**, Citral**, Citronellol*, Limonene*, Linalool**

*ingredients from certified organic agriculture
**natural essential oils

entry.title: HEJ Organic Glow Drops 14ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: Hej
Type: Face Serum
Price: 11.50

Glow Drops make your complexion shine and are the perfect finish for every look - whether with or without make-up. Compatible with every product, but can also shine all on its own. Niacinamide helps refine your pores.

  • Glowy finish or spot highlights
  • Even skin texture thanks to niacinamide
  • Can be used for face and body
  • Suitable for all skin types 
  • 100% fragrance free  

How to use: Mix 3-5 drops with your care or foundation. For that extra glow you can also apply directly to the skin. Add highlights to your cheeks or eyelids.

Ingredients: Aqua (Water), Glycerin, Neopentyl Glycol Dicaprylate/Dicaprate, Tridecyl Trimellitate, Dicaprylyl Ether, CI 77891 (Titanium Dioxide), Hydroxypropyl Starch, Glyceryl Stearate SE, Synthetic Flourphlogopite, Mica, Niacinamide, Tocopherol, Citrullus Lanatus Fruit Extract, Phenoxyethanol, Oryza Sativa Starch, Sodium Stearoyl Glutamate, Xanthan Gum, Sodium Acrylates Copolymer, Ethylhexyglycerin, CI 77492 (Iron Oxides), CI 77491 (Iron Oxides), Citric Acid, Lecithin, Tocopheryl Acetate, Tin Oxide, Sodium Citrate

entry.title: HEJ Organic Sun Drops 15ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: Hej
Type: Face Serum
Price: 11.50

Sun Drops tan your skin evenly and ensure a glowy finish. Aloe vera provides your skin with intensive moisture, can be combined with all care products.

  • Gentle tanning effect thanks to DHA
  • Aloe Vera nourishes the skin
  • Can be dosed individually
  • Suitable for all skin types 
  • 100% fragrance free 

How to use: Peel your skin before use for an even result. Mix 2-5 drops into the care product and distribute it evenly over the face, neck and décolleté. Wash your hands after use. The tanning starts after approx. 5-8 hours and lasts for 3-5 days. 

Ingredients: Aqua (Water), Dihydroxyacetone, Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Juice, Pentylene Glycol, Xanthan Gum, Citric Acid, Potassium Sorbate, Sodium Benzoate

entry.title: MÁDARA SPF30 Plant Stem Cell Age-Defying Face Sunscreen 40ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: MADARA
Type: Suncreen
Price: 32.90

Ingredients from natural origin meet cellular biology to create this break-through daily sunscreen that provides high level protection with an invisible, flawless nude skin finish. 

Innovative formula with patent pending stem cells from Northern Dragonhead deliver a hyper dose of antioxidants to completely shield the skin from urban pollution while also regenerating and protecting the skin microbiome for an age-defying effect.

The ultra-light, subtly tinted texture infused with hyaluronic acid and SPF-boosting raspberry seed oil glides onto the skin easily, leaving no white marks. Utmost protection for a forever sun kissed look.

How to use: Apply to clean skin or over your daily moisturiser. Reapply if necessary during the day.

Ingredients: Zinc Oxide, Aloe Barbadensis (Aloe) Leaf Juice, Dicaprylyl Carbonate, Isoamyl Laurate, Lecithin, Polyglyceryl-3 ricinoleate, Glycerin, Butylene Glycol, Sorbitan olivate, Aqua, CI 77891 (Titanium Dioxide), Oryza Sativa (Rice) Bran Oil, Vegetable Oil, Helianthus Annuus (Sunflower) Seed Wax, Oryza Sativa (Rice) Bran Wax, Rhus Succedanea Fruit Wax, Hydrated Silica, Aroma, Sodium Chloride, Xanthan Gum, Sorbitan Caprylate, Jojoba Esters, Citric acid, Propanediol, Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride, Dracocephalum Ruyschiana (Dragonhead) Cell Culture Extract, Polyhydroxystearic Acid, Rubus Idaeus (Raspberry) Seed Oil, Caprylyl glycol, Benzoic Acid, Tocopherol, Ascorbyl Palmitate, CI 77491 (Iron Oxides), CI 77492 (Iron Oxides), CI 77499 (Iron Oxides), Sodium phytate, Camellia Sinensis (Green Tea) Leaf Extract, Quercus Robur (Oak) Bark Extract, Vitis Vinifera (Grape) Seed Extract, Isostearic Acid, Polyglyceryl-3 Polyricinoleate, Sodium Benzoate, Hydrolyzed Hyaluronic Acid, Sodium Hyaluronate, Potassium Sorbate, Propylene Glycol, Limonene, Benzyl Salicylate, Citral, Linalool, Eugenol

* Please note that ingredient lists may change and slightly vary from time to time. You will always find the most up-to-date information on the actual product packaging.

entry.title: Magrada Carrot Oil With Rosemary Extract 75ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: Magrada Organic Cosmetics
Type: Tanning Oil & Lotion
Price: 14.20

Based on the power of the rich vitamin content of carrots, we have created a face and body oil which is ideal for daily care with its minimalistic formula. The carrot elixir will prepare your skin for the sunny season and for sunbathing.

The composition brings together sunflower seed oil and the powerful extracts of carrot root and rosemary. The product helps the tan to last longer, accelerates the processes of tanning, and keeps the skin moisturised. The golden colour of the carrot oil also adds a golden finish to the skin.

  • Carrot root extract facilitates tanning and helps the sunny complexion to last longer.
  • Rosemary extract is a great anti-inflammatory antioxidant which is also suitable for sensitive and delicate skin.
  • Sunflower seed oil is an incredibly rich source of natural vitamin E and essential fatty acids – omega-6 and omega-9. The light, nurturing oil is ideal for moisturising, calming, and restoring the skin, and also helps to improve your complexion.

The oil is made of the roots of organic carrots which are harvested from June to October. Carrot roots are soaked in sunflower seed oil, which gives the product its yellowish orange colour. This, in turn, gives the sunbathing elixir its high beta carotene and vitamin concentration.

How to use: Start using the oil a few weeks before going on a holiday in the south or before the beginning of the beach season. Apply it on clean skin in the evening – this will help the elixir to absorb best and make it as beneficial as possible for the skin. Continue using the product every day during the sunbathing period. Use the oil after having spent time in the sun to make the complexion last longer and preserve the tan longer. Always use sunscreen before going out on a sunny day or sunbathing, as the oil does not contain any UV filters. The product will not stain your clothing.

Ingredients: Helianthus Annuus (Sunflower) Seed Oil*, Daucus Carota Sativa (Carrot) Root Extract*, Rosemary (Rosmarinus Officinalis) Leaf Extract*

*COSMOS Certified Organic Ingredient

Ingredients of natural origin: 100%. Ingredients of organic origin: 100%. 

The list of ingredients may be changed. Please see the packaging for the updated and most accurate list of ingredients.

paraben-free | sulphate-free | silicone-free | vegan | alcohol-free | fragrance-free | EU allergen-free | cruelty-free | hand-made | with a minimal list of ingredients

entry.title: HOIA Body Cocktail Body Glam 50ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: HOIA
Type: Body Serum
Price: 18.90

Body Glam is designed for women who want it all! It will leave your skin hydrated, silky soft and gives your skin a nice suntouched shimmering glow. This body cocktail is based on organic apple, hibiscus and watermelon hydrosols. The product has a natural fruity smell and it pampers your skin with botanical vitamins, phytosterols, minerals and antioxidants. It is enriched with a bioactive cocktail of hyaluronic acid, wild algae and aloe. Our body cocktail effectively hydrates all outer skin layers, smoothes out fine lines and leaves your skin soft. Shimmering particles in the product are of mineral origin which do not pollute environment.

How to use: Apply on skin, massage until absorbed and enjoy your beautifully glowing skin.

Ingredients: *Pyrus Malus Fruit Water, *Citrullus Vulgaris Fruit Water, *Hibiscus Rosa-Sinensis Flower Water, *Glycerin, Aqua, Sodium Levulinate, Sodium Anisate, Sodium Hyaluronate, Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Juice Powder, Furcellaria Lumbricalis Extract, Xanthan Gum, Mica, Iron Oxide, Citric Acid. *From organic farming.

Handmade in Saaremaa

entry.title: NAIF Mineral Sunscreen SPF50 for Baby & Kids 100ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: NAIF
Type: Suncreen
Price: 22.90

Naif Mineral Sunscreen Spray SPF50 is developed for the sensitive skin of a baby and kids with a reef-friendly formula. The zinc oxide based UV filter protects the skin immediately with minimum risk of skin irritation.

The zinc oxide based UV filter adds a protective layer on top of the skin which reflects the sunbeams. This results in immediate effectiveness against UVA and UVB radiation. The added natural oils make application easy and hydrates the skin.

How to use: Shake the sunscreen before use. Apply a generous amount evenly to the body and face before your kids go in the sun. Reapply every two hours and after swimming for optimum protection. Do not keep product in the sun.

Ingredients: Decyl Oleate, Zinc Oxide, Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride, Triheptanoin, Coco-Caprylate/Caprate, Hydrogenated Vegetable Oil, Dextrin Palmitate, Parfum/Fragrance, Tocopherol, Polyhydroxystearic Acid, Allantoin, Helianthus Annuus Seed Oil, Bisabolol, Pongamol, Palmitic Acid.

Tube made from recycled plastic

entry.title: NAIF Mineral Sunscreen Spray SPF50 for Baby & Kids 100ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: NAIF
Type: Suncreen
Price: 23.90

Naif Mineral Sunscreen Spray SPF50 is developed for the sensitive skin of a baby and kids with a reef-friendly formula. The zinc-oxide based mineral filter protects the skin immediately against UVA and UVB with minimum risk of skin irritation. The convenient spray makes for a quick and easy application. Immediate effectiveness against UVA and UVB radiation.

How to use: Shake the spray before use. Apply a generous amount to the body and face before your kids go in the sun. Reapply every two hours and after swimming for optimum protection. Do not keep product in the sun.

Ingredients: Decyl Oleate, Zinc Oxide, Coco-Caprylate/Caprate, Alcohol, Triheptanoin, Polyhydroxystearic Acid, Allantoin, Tocopherol, Aqua/Water, Silica Dimethyl Silylate, Pongamol, Helianthus Annuus Seed Oil, Bisabolol, Denatonium Benzoate.

Bottle made from bioplastic

entry.title: BEE IT Aftersun 50ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: BEE IT
Type: Tanning Oil & Lotion
Price: 8.90

Precious after-sun in a delicate and fresh gel texture, enriched with golden microspheres to even out the color of your skin with a soft luminescent touch. Natural formula with hyaluronic acid, inositol, acmella, organic honey and propolis for an effective moisturizing, antioxidant, regenerating and smoothing action. For deeply nourished and hydrated skin.

How to use: Apply to face/body after sun exposure, ready for the wow effect.

Ingredients: Aqua [Water], Polysorbate 20, Parfum [Fragrance], Carbomer, Mannitol, Phenoxyethanol, Microcrystalline cellulose, Sodium hydroxide, Tetrasodium glutamate diacetate, Ethylhexylglycerin, Propanediol, CI 77492 [Iron oxides], CI 77491 [Iron oxides], Mica, Acmella oleracea extract, Acrylates/ammonium methacrylate copolymer, CI 77891 [Titanium dioxide], Tocopheryl acetate, Triethyl citrate, Caprylic/capric triglyceride, CI 77499 [Iron oxides], Titanium dioxide, Hydroxypropyl methylcellulose, Sodium hyaluronate, 1,2-Hexanediol, Simethicone, Inositol, Mel/Honey*, Propolis wax.

*Organic

Animal Friendly | No Paraffin | No Silicones | No Parabens | 100% Recyclable

“Less plastic is fantastic” packaging is using 70% less plastic compared to a normal bottle pack. Less bulk, being soft and doesn’t break, generates a better recycling chain and allows use of all its contents.

By purchasing BEE IT cosmetics  you contribute to the creation of new bee oasis. 

Made in Italy

entry.title: BEE IT SUN SPF30 50ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: BEE IT
Type: Tanning Oil & Lotion
Price: 7.90

Sun cream which protects, nourishes and hydrates the skin, favouring an intense and even tan. Organic Aloe Vera extract, combined with sweet almond oil, zinc oxide, vitamin E, organic honey and propolis, helps prevent premature aging caused by exposure to UV rays. For hydrated, supple, soft and enviably tanned skin.

How to use: Apply to face/body before sun exposure, repeating the application frequently for a safe, even and long-lasting tan.

Ingredients: Aqua [Water], Ethylhexyl methoxycinnamate, Octocrylene, Butyl methoxydibenzoylmethane, Glyceryl stearate SE, Cetearyl alcohol, Helianthus annuus (Sunflower) seed oil, Prunus amygdalus dulcis (Sweet almond) oil, Methylene bis-benzotriazolyl tetramethylbutylphenol, Phenoxyethanol, Parfum [Fragrance], Decyl glucoside, Citric acid, Glycerin, Titanium dioxide, Tocopheryl acetate, Ethylhexylglycerin, Tetrasodium glutamate diacetate, Zinc oxide, Aloe barbadensis leaf juice*, Propylene glycol, Xanthan gum, Mel/Honey*, Propolis wax, Sodium benzoate, Potassium sorbate.

*Organic

Animal Friendly | No Paraffin | No Silicones | No Parabens | 100% Recyclable

“Less plastic is fantastic” packaging is using 70% less plastic compared to a normal bottle pack. Less bulk, being soft and doesn’t break, generates a better recycling chain and allows use of all its contents.

By purchasing BEE IT cosmetics  you contribute to the creation of new bee oasis. 

Made in Italy
